title: White Shelf Brackets 10-Pack - 9x7 inch, High Capacity 20kg, Stainless Steel, Modern Design for Home, Garage, Utility Rooms - Durable Wall Mount Shelves Support
features: Durable & Strong – Made from high-quality metal, these shelving brackets support up to 20kg, providing a sturdy and reliable hold for your shelves.
Versatile Sizing Options – Available in two practical sizes: 9x7 inches and 8x6 inches, allowing you to choose the best fit for your storage needs.
10-Pack for Multiple Uses – Includes 10 heavy-duty brackets, perfect for installing multiple shelves in your home, garage, shed, or workspace.
Perfect for Various Spaces – Ideal for supporting wooden shelves in garages, sheds, utility rooms, workshops, and even home offices or kitchens.
Sleek & Minimalist Design – A simple yet modern design that blends seamlessly with any décor while keeping your shelves securely in place.
description: Maximize storage with our heavy-duty shelving brackets, built for strength and durability. Perfect for garages, sheds, utility rooms, and workspaces, they provide a secure, sturdy foundation for your shelves. Each 10-pack makes it easy to install multiple shelves. Made from high-quality metal, they hold up to 20kg for reliable support. Available in 9x7” and 8x6”, their sleek, minimalist design blends seamlessly into any space. Upgrade your storage with these strong, stable, and versatile brackets!
